subject: our-game MOBILE-FIRST layout (PR#78) + game-over touch-restart gap
source: headless Chrome emulating a landscape Android phone (Pixel 7, 844x390, hasTouch); full-page screenshots + measured canvas fill + game-over state forced via real game state
note: LAYOUT VERIFIED (PR#78): the canvas now fills 100% of viewport HEIGHT (was letterboxed before) — moon-to-ground, mobile-first. DEFECT CONFIRMED (TOUCH-1, from playtest): at GAME OVER the prompt says 'press R to restart' (keyboard-only) and the touch overlay has NO restart control (hasRestartControl=false; buttons only ▲◀▶▼/JUMP/FIRE) — a touchscreen player is STRANDED after death. Real mobile-playability blocker.

frames.shows: mobile-first layout: canvas fills viewport height, clean touch overlay, gameplay
BEFORE fix: GAME OVER — 'press R to restart' (keyboard only), no touch restart → stranded (TOUCH-1)
AFTER fix (PR#82): GAME OVER — 'TAP TO RESTART'; verified a touch press restarts (status gameover→playing, lives→3, respawn). TOUCH-1 RESOLVED.
